## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] New theme (adds an Oh My Posh theme to the catalog)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that changes existing behavior)
- [ ] Documentation update

## Related Issue

<!-- Link the issue this PR closes, e.g. Closes #12 -->

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read `CONTRIBUTING.md`
- [ ] `Istar-Pack.ps1` still parses on PowerShell 5.1 **and** 7+
      (the CI `validate.yml` workflow must pass)
- [ ] The file still starts with the UTF-8 BOM
- [ ] I updated `CHANGELOG.md` under the relevant version heading
- [ ] I tested the change on a clean Windows machine (or documented why I couldn't)
